security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first catalog for your AI coding projects and sessions.
bundle.longDescription: Code Hangar inventories the projects and chat sessions your AI coding tools (Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT, and more) leave on your machine — entirely locally. Browse and search them, understand each folder, find duplicates and orphaned model files, and reclaim disk space with a fully reversible, backup-first workflow. No account, no telemetry, no network: your data never leaves your PC and is encrypted at rest.
